parameters.query:
UPDATE assets SET
  http_status = {{ $json.status_code }},
  tech_stack = ARRAY[{{ $json.tech_stack.map(t => "'" + t + "'").join(',') || "'unknown'" }}],
  last_tested = NOW()
WHERE id = '{{ $json.asset_id }}';

meta.description: RECON OS WF-06: HTTP Recon — probes authorized assets for security headers, TLS info, tech stack, and version disclosure. Safe, single-request, rate-limited. Flags findings to WF-08.
